title: Whitefurze Plant Pot Set, Terracotta, 3 Inch/7.5 Centimeters
availability_text: Only 9 left in stock (more on the way).
features: COMPLETE SET: Includes 10 plant pots (7.5 cm/3 inch diameter) and 5 matching saucers for efficient indoor or outdoor gardening
UK MANUFACTURING: Crafted in the United Kingdom, ensuring high-quality construction and reliable durability
VERSATILE DESIGN: Terracotta-coloured plastic pots suitable for growing herbs, seedlings, and small plants with proper drainage
PRACTICAL FEATURES: Sturdy plastic construction with complementary saucers to catch excess water and protect surfaces
PERFECT SIZE: Ideal 7.5 cm diameter makes these pots perfect for starting seeds or transplanting small plants and cuttings
description: Cultivate your garden with this practical set of 10 terracotta plant pots and 5 matching saucers, proudly made in the UK. Each pot measures 7.5 centimetres (3 inches) in diameter, making them perfect for seedlings, small plants, and herbs. The classic terracotta design provides excellent drainage and airflow for healthy root development, while the accompanying saucers protect your surfaces from water damage. These versatile pots are ideal for both indoor and outdoor use, suitable for starting your garden from seeds or transplanting smaller plants. The sturdy construction ensures durability, while the traditional terracotta colour adds a timeless aesthetic to any gardening space. The convenient set of 10 pots with 5 saucers offers excellent value for both novice gardeners and experienced horticulturists alike. Whether you're creating an herb garden, propagating plants, or starting your seasonal seedlings, these pots provide the perfect foundation for your growing needs.
